rulings.Case Title: CHARLES JOHNSON VS. A NEAL BAILEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Johnson V Bailey Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 23, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT A. BAILEY and ANJULANT REAL ESTATE PROPERTIES LLC's Motion To Set Aside Default Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you appear in-person for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or a face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing moving and opposing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (note: prevailing party to prepare an order repeating the tentative ruling verbatim in addition to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Dept501Orders@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). All communications sent to the Court must be copied to the opposing party/counsel for whom e-mail addresses are known. The e-mail address provided herein shall only be used for the purposes indicated above. No unauthorized communications will be considered or responded to. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default is DENIED. Motion is brought solely under CCP 473(b) and is untimely. Cases cited by the moving party (6:1-8) are not on point. = (501/CFH)
